name: Necesse
description:
This Docker will download and install SteamCMD. It will also install Necesse and run it.

ATTENTION: First Startup can take very long since it downloads the gameserver files!

Update Notice: Simply restart the container if a newer version of the game is available.

You can also run multiple servers with only one SteamCMD directory!

ports.name: UDP - Game Port
ports.description: UDP Game Port (If you need another port delete this Entry and create a new UDP port mapping with the corresponding port | also don't forget to set the right port in your server configuration file!)

ports.name: TCP - WebConsole
ports.description: WebConsole (by default, you can connect to the Necesse console by opening your browser and go to HOSTIP:9023 - eg: 192.168.1.1:9023 - or click on WebUI on the Docker page within Unraid).

variables.name: GAME_PARAMS
variables.description: Enter your extra start up commands for the server here otherwise leave empty.

variables.name: GAME_ID
variables.description: The GAME_ID that the container downloads at startup. If you want to install a static or beta version of the game change the value to: '1169370 -beta YOURBRANCH' (without quotes, replace YOURBRANCH with the branch or version you want to install).

variables.name: World Name
variables.description: Specify the world name here (your worlds are saved in .../.config/Necesse/saves/)
